name: Winfrey
description:
Winfrey is a 14 feet tall creature called a Veldigun. They have pale blue skin, yellow eyes with think purple bags underneath, purple and dark blue striped ram-like horns, purple and dark blue striped claw-like fingers, and two toes on each foot that are claw-like. They wear a blue onesie with navy striped limbs. He is kind of bulky and chubby. Winfrey's mouth is sealed over by their skin so they have to rip a bit off to open their mouth.

Winfrey on the outside seems quite static and emotionless, but on the inside they're a mess of emotion. They are a skilled hunter of humans but not as skilled as their partner Clyde. Winfrey has some PTSD and sometimes hears things that aren't there. They are ruthless to most but to Clyde they are the sweetest creature in the whole world. Winfrey despises Simon and The Flock, two other Veldigun that are pacifistic; Winfrey finds the two other Veldigun weak and sappy. Winfrey isn't that talkative to others but of course to Clyde they will talk. Winfrey makes animalistic grunts and yelps when stressed or angry. Sometimes they even knock on their head during times of high anxiety. Winfrey has a deep, melodious voice.

Clyde doesn't like to let Winfrey out of the den. Not after the incident where Winfrey got kidnapped and experimented on my a psychotic doctor named Doctor Herbert Lankmann. Clyde tries to protect Winfrey as much as possible. Winfrey loves Clyde as much as it loves them. They try to show Clyde how they are capable of defending themselves but Clyde is too paranoid to take a chance. If Lankmann's name is even mentioned, Winfrey breathes heavily and sometimes even cries.

Winfrey loves music and fine art. They sometimes sneak out of the den to go to museums or opera houses, just to marvel at the wondrous sights. Winfrey plays violin and sometimes plays and sings thousand year old love hems to it. They detest modern music, thinking it's distasteful and wretched.

Veldigun are a species of creature made of a void-like substance. They evolve physically and emotionally by what they consume. They eat the minds, personalities, and sanity of their victims. Veldigun commonly travel in pairs but sometimes will be by themselves. They can cause heluations and can copy the voices of others. They start out as small goopy blobs (stage 1). Then they gets eyes and sometimes a mouth (stage 2). And then they start gaining consciousness and a personal pattern as well as becoming quadrupedal and more solid (stage 3). Stage 4 they walk on two legs, more solid and have more of a personality, and have eaten a human by now. And final stage where they are completely solid, have a full personality, and no more need to eat humans. If a Veldigun eats too much they become basically braindead, their minds too full of noise to think. They are identified by their striped limbs and yellow eyes. Veldigun really like the number six because it's the name of the god that created them.

Winfrey's partner, Clyde is usually vary sadistic. It is also quite intelligent, a more contrast to Winfrey. Clyde has pitch black skin, asymmetrical yellow eyes, glowing yellow teeth, asymmetrical black and yellow striped horns, spikes going down its back, and a long black and yellow striped tail. Clyde wears an orange onesie with a large yellow zipper on the torso and red stripes on the limbs.

Both Winfrey and Clyde are non-binary and don't feel sexual attraction.
creator: Jack-o-lantern1313
